title: Deserialize and validate a bulk DTO
scenario: Batch adapter input needs useful error context. Preserve the row index when one nested DTO cannot become a command.
instructions: Add BulkRegisterDto with serde::Deserialize, BulkRegisterCommand, and BulkRegisterError. Implement TryFrom<BulkRegisterDto>, rejecting empty batches and reporting the index of the first invalid nested DTO.

hints.body: The bulk DTO is another transport shape, so it can derive Deserialize.
Convert each nested DTO through the single-user TryFrom implementation.
Use enumerate so InvalidUser can report the failing index.

completionExplanation: Bulk conversion now reuses the single DTO boundary rules and adds batch-level errors without duplicating validation.

cases.name: command-direct-fields
command-serde-free
